name: faceted-prompting
description: Faceted Prompting — structured prompt composition for LLMs

scripts.test:e2e: tmp="$(mktemp -t faceted-prompting-e2e.XXXXXX)"; mkdir -p e2e/results; npm run test:e2e:cli >"$tmp" 2>&1; code=$?; cat "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"; if [ "$code" -eq 0 ]; then msg='test:e2e passed'; else msg="test:e2e failed (exit=$code)"; fi; if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"faceted-prompting\" subtitle \"E2E\"" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; echo "[faceted-prompting] $msg"; exit $code
scripts.check:release: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 0 ]; then msg='check:release passed'; else msg="check:release failed (exit=$code)"; fi; if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"faceted-prompting\" subtitle \"Release Check\"" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; echo "[faceted-prompting] $msg"; exit $code
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test
